name: Orange Macadamia Nut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, stir together flour, powdered sugar and cornstarch.
2. Using a pastry blender, cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in nuts.
4. Combine egg yolks, 1 tablespoon orange peel and 4 tablespoons orange juice; add to flour mixture, stirring until moistened. If needed, add more orange juice to moisten.
5. On lightly floured surface, knead dough until it forms a ball.
6. Shape dough into 1-¼ inch balls.
7. Arrange balls on ungreased baking sheets; flatten by pressing with the bottom of a glass to ½ inch thickness, dipping glass in sugar for each round.
8. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes or until edges begin to brown.
9. Remove from baking sheets and cool on wire rack.
10. Frost with Orange Frosting. If desired, garnish with finely shredded orange peel.
Orange Frosting:
2 cups Powdered Sugar (sifted)
3 tablespoons Butter (softened)
1 teaspoon Fine Shredded Orange Peel
2 tablespoons Orange Juice (to 3 tablespoons)
